# Lakshmi Thanuja Dharmavarapu — Portfolio

> Portfolio of Lakshmi Thanuja Dharmavarapu, an aspiring software engineer working on IoT security, AI-powered computer vision, and data analysis & visualization.

Lakshmi Thanuja is a computer science student at SRKR Engineering College with internship experience at Infosys Springboard and Microsoft. Her work focuses on ESP32/YOLO-based intrusion detection, Python data analysis, and interactive web experiences.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Interactive dashboard covering skills, projects, experience, certificates, achievements, and contact.

## Optional

- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/lakshmi-thanuja-dharmavarapu-software-developer): Professional profile.
